title: All About Kaworu nagisa
wikitext:
[]: All About Kaworu nagisa             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Sun Jan 04, 2009 7:56 pm Magami talking 'bout Kaworu? Who would've though in this day and age...XD So I recently found this book at my local...Kino...and was wondering if anyone else has heard of it. Would it be worth it to acquire this with only a minimal understanding of Japanese? (and by minimal, I mean fading fast. >.<) Even so, I doubt this bout would go beyond what we've already been told about the enigmatic bishounen, although maybe there are more developments concerning his rebuild incarnation...I wouldn't know, I'm STILL out of the loop. [url]http://www.akadot.com/product_info.php?products_id=27303[/url] Apologies in advance if this thing has already been discussed somewhere...I figured this sub-forum would be the correct one to pose the question anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 04, 2009 10:43 pm I want that.

[]:             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Sun Jan 04, 2009 11:25 pm Then I must want it too.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Jan 04, 2009 11:40 pm I'm interested since it might explain Kaworu's character more.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jan 04, 2009 11:56 pm Magami no D00M wrote: Then I must want it too.

[]:             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Mon Jan 05, 2009 12:07 am I do consider that fact, Aaron. =p Just a bit rusty in remembering the little factoids about this place is all. I'm trying, and creating a thread will certainly help. Still...in the interest of keeping this on topic, I think I'll just say that I'm glad I brought the book to everyone's attention, and I will likely purchase it anyway, even if I can't read most of it. I actually like that website I linked as well, first time ever seeing it. o.O

Article: All About Kaworu nagisa
[]: All About Kaworu nagisa             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Sun Jan 04, 2009 7:56 pm Magami talking 'bout Kaworu? Who would've though in this day and age...XD So I recently found this book at my local...Kino...and was wondering if anyone else has heard of it. Would it be worth it to acquire this with only a minimal understanding of Japanese? (and by minimal, I mean fading fast. >.<) Even so, I doubt this bout would go beyond what we've already been told about the enigmatic bishounen, although maybe there are more developments concerning his rebuild incarnation...I wouldn't know, I'm STILL out of the loop. [url]http://www.akadot.com/product_info.php?products_id=27303[/url] Apologies in advance if this thing has already been discussed somewhere...I figured this sub-forum would be the correct one to pose the question anyway.

Still...in the interest of keeping this on topic, I think I'll just say that I'm glad I brought the book to everyone's attention, and I will likely purchase it anyway, even if I can't read most of it. I actually like that website I linked as well, first time ever seeing it. o.O
